scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: node infra/wait-for-http.mjs http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/config/ 90000 && npm run dev:frontend
scripts.infra:down: docker compose stop livekit redis livekit-egress owncast
scripts.dev:with-infra: npm run infra:up && npm run dev
